meaning: adj.极超音速的,远超过音速的
examples: The university has been working on hypersonic technology for nearly 16 years.
We know how to insert the aircraft into atmospheric hypersonic flight.
The system will be capable of destroying hypersonic and ballistic targets.
Eventually, the X-51's hypersonic propulsion technology may be applied to civil aviation as well.
Woody Norris' HyperSonic Sound, or HSS, is about to hit the mainstream in a very big way.
